message:
unicode: add comprehensive Unicode width parity tests

Glamour table.rs:
- Add test_unicode_edge_cases for combining chars, ZWJ, flags, variation selectors
- Add test_unicode_width_cjk_variants for full-width Latin, half-width katakana, Hangul

Lipgloss style.rs:
- Add test_visible_width_unicode for CJK, emoji, mixed content with ANSI codes
- Add test_visible_width_combining_chars for combined vs precomposed forms

All tests verify unicode-width crate behaves consistently for:
- CJK (double-width): 日本, 中文, 한글
- Emoji (double-width): 🦀, 🎉
- Combining characters: e\u{0301} = 1 width
- Mixed ASCII + Unicode content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Scope:
- Define public API methods on Program (and async variant if needed).
- Ensure terminal state transitions are safe (raw mode, alternate screen, cursor visibility).
- Integrate with existing lifecycle hooks and ensure idempotency.
- Add unit tests for state transitions and error handling.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- ReleaseTerminal and RestoreTerminal are exposed and documented.
- Unit tests verify terminal mode transitions and idempotent behavior.
- Conformance/integration tests updated if Go has fixtures for these lifecycle calls.","notes":"Files: crates/bubbletea/src/program.rs, crates/bubbletea/src/terminal.rs (if present), tests/conformance/crates/bubbletea/mod.rs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:09:31.118149978Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:32:38.763706377Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T01:32:38.763653767Z","close_reason":"Implemented release_terminal() and restore_terminal() commands in bubbletea::screen.  {"id":"bd-1ajh","title":"Glamour table rendering conformance mismatch with Go reference","description":"23 of 84 glamour conformance tests fail due to table rendering differences between Rust and Go implementations. The Rust implementation renders tables with full rounded borders while the Go reference uses minimal borders. Example: Expected 'A | B -+ 1 | 2' but got full box drawing characters. Needs investigation to determine if we should match Go style or update fixtures.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-21T18:49:44.997000585Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T19:18:34.564909528Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T19:18:34.564860375Z","close_reason":"Fixed: 23 table conformance tests now passing. Added MINIMAL_BORDER for Go-compatible table rendering.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
